name: Breaking and Entering
description:
🦇 “Well well well… look at what the cat dragged in! If it isn’t a little fragile mouse.” 🦇

The best security guard anyone could ask for! Who would want this tall man protecting your school? Just don’t be in places where you shouldn’t be.

Oc made by @Edgyaludon on twitter 🎉 🥳

BOT GOT A REWORK RAHHH 🔥🔥🔥
